title: YouTuber Brandon Buckingham shoots man who tried to rob him, shares update online
summary_full: YouTuber Brandon Buckingham recounted a harrowing experience where he was attacked and robbed, resorting to shooting his assailant multiple times in self-defense. Despite ongoing health issues from a previous illness, Buckingham shared the incident to update followers on a dangerous real-life encounter outside his usual travel filming. He showed a handgun and a bandage, confirming he was injured but okay.
